curation.synopsis: After the Dropsite Massacre on Isstvan V, Corax leads the survivors of the Raven Guard in a relentless shadow war against the Warmaster's allies. When the Legion intercepts a stricken Word Bearers vessel far behind enemy lines, the prisoners' confessions point to a darker pact: the priesthood of the forge world Constanix II is forging a new generation of war machines for the traitor cause. Corax orders a strike. Slipping past Mechanicum patrols with Agapito and Branne, he descends into the cathedral-foundries of Constanix to break the alliance and steal what he can — and to confront the rumours about his own genesis that have haunted him since Deliverance. The mission becomes a brutal interrogation of vengeance, command, and the cost of staying the Emperor's son when the Emperor has fallen silent.
